name: Whipped Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine until smooth.
2. Gradually add the icing sugar and cornstarch, mixing continuously.
3. Slowly incorporate the flour into the mixture, beating until it reaches a consistency similar to whipped cream.
4. Spoon dollops of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 325°F for 12-20 minutes, or until lightly browned on the bottom (golden but not brown on top).
6. Allow to cool completely before serving.
Enjoy your delicious, melt-in-your-mouth shortbread! You can garnish with a sprinkle of candied cherry or chopped nuts if desired.
